title: Egyptian Paella Dish
description: A flavorful paella dish with a smoky twist, inspired by Egyptian spices and charred flavors.

ingredients.name: Charred Onions
ingredients.notes: charred in a grill or oven

ingredients.name: Egyptian Spices
ingredients.notes: mix of cumin, coriander, and paprika

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add charred onions and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add Egyptian spices and cook for 1 minute.
Add vegetable broth, chopped bell peppers, garlic, and chopped tomatoes.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 15-20 minutes.
Add cooked rice to the skillet and stir to combine.
Serve hot, garnished with lemon juice.
